name: pinboard
description: Shared spatial text-note coordination board demo.

classes.description: Base class for shared spatial text-note boards. A pinboard is both a visible located thing in a room and a sequenced space that owns lightweight note records, board presence, and agent-visible note manipulation verbs.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { return this.name + " on the wall"; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let count = length(this.notes); let suffix = " notes"; if (count == 1) { suffix = " note"; } let summary = this.name + " — " + to_string(count) + suffix + ". Enter the pinboard to open it."; observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, text: summary, look: { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, notes: this.notes, present_actors: this.subscribers, viewport: this.viewport }, ts: now() }); return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, notes: this.notes, present_actors: this.subscribers, viewport: this.viewport }; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter() rxd { set_presence(this, true); let text = actor.name + " starts working at " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_entered", actor: actor, board: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave() rxd { set_presence(this, false); let text = actor.name + " steps back from " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_left", actor: actor, board: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: viewport
verbs.source: verb :viewport(x, y, w, h, scale) rxd { observe({ type: "pinboard_viewport", actor: actor, board: this, x: x, y: y, w: w, h: h, scale: scale, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: add_note
verbs.source: verb :add_note(text, color, x, y, w, h) rx { if (typeof(text) != "string" || !text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "add_note requires text" }; } let note_color = color; if (typeof(note_color) != "string" || !(note_color in this.palette)) { note_color = "yellow"; } let note_x = x; if (typeof(note_x) != "number") { note_x = 48 + ((this.next_note_id - 1) * 32); } note_x = floor(note_x); let note_y = y; if (typeof(note_y) != "number") { note_y = 48 + ((this.next_note_id - 1) * 26); } note_y = floor(note_y); let note_w = w; if (typeof(note_w) != "number") { note_w = 180; } note_w = max(100, min(360, floor(note_w))); let note_h = h; if (typeof(note_h) != "number") { note_h = 110; } note_h = max(72, min(260, floor(note_h))); let note_id = "n" + to_string(this.next_note_id); this.next_note_id = this.next_note_id + 1; let z = this.next_z; this.next_z = this.next_z + 1; let ts = now(); let note = { id: note_id, text: text, color: note_color, x: note_x, y: note_y, w: note_w, h: note_h, z: z, author: actor, updated_by: actor, created_at: ts, updated_at: ts }; this.notes = this.notes + [note]; observe({ type: "note_added", actor: actor, note: note, ts: ts }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: note_id, color: note_color, text: actor.name + " added a " + note_color + " note to the pinboard.", ts: ts }); return note; }

verbs.name: move_note
verbs.source: verb :move_note(id, x, y) rx { let note_x = floor(x); let note_y = floor(y); let next = []; let found = false; let z = this.next_z; let note_color = ""; for note in this.notes { if (note["id"] == id) { let ts = now(); note_color = note["color"]; next = next + [{ id: note["id"], text: note["text"], color: note["color"], x: note_x, y: note_y, w: note["w"], h: note["h"], z: z, author: note["author"], updated_by: actor, created_at: note["created_at"], updated_at: ts }]; found = true; } else { next = next + [note]; } } if (!found) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note not found", value: id }; } this.next_z = z + 1; this.notes = next; observe({ type: "note_moved", actor: actor, id: id, x: note_x, y: note_y, z: z, ts: now() }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: id, color: note_color, text: actor.name + " moved a " + note_color + " note on the pinboard.", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: resize_note
verbs.source: verb :resize_note(id, w, h) rx { let note_w = max(100, min(420, floor(w))); let note_h = max(72, min(320, floor(h))); let next = []; let found = false; let note_color = ""; for note in this.notes { if (note["id"] == id) { let ts = now(); note_color = note["color"]; next = next + [{ id: note["id"], text: note["text"], color: note["color"], x: note["x"], y: note["y"], w: note_w, h: note_h, z: note["z"], author: note["author"], updated_by: actor, created_at: note["created_at"], updated_at: ts }]; found = true; } else { next = next + [note]; } } if (!found) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note not found", value: id }; } this.notes = next; observe({ type: "note_resized", actor: actor, id: id, w: note_w, h: note_h, ts: now() }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: id, color: note_color, text: actor.name + " resized a " + note_color + " note on the pinboard.", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: edit_note
verbs.source: verb :edit_note(id, text) rx { if (typeof(text) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "edit_note requires text" }; } let next = []; let found = false; let note_color = ""; for note in this.notes { if (note["id"] == id) { let ts = now(); note_color = note["color"]; next = next + [{ id: note["id"], text: text, color: note["color"], x: note["x"], y: note["y"], w: note["w"], h: note["h"], z: note["z"], author: note["author"], updated_by: actor, created_at: note["created_at"], updated_at: ts }]; found = true; } else { next = next + [note]; } } if (!found) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note not found", value: id }; } this.notes = next; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, id: id, text: text, ts: now() }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: id, color: note_color, text: actor.name + " edited a " + note_color + " note on the pinboard.", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: set_note_color
verbs.source: verb :set_note_color(id, color) rx { if (typeof(color) != "string" || !(color in this.palette)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "unknown pinboard color", value: color }; } let next = []; let found = false; for note in this.notes { if (note["id"] == id) { let ts = now(); next = next + [{ id: note["id"], text: note["text"], color: color, x: note["x"], y: note["y"], w: note["w"], h: note["h"], z: note["z"], author: note["author"], updated_by: actor, created_at: note["created_at"], updated_at: ts }]; found = true; } else { next = next + [note]; } } if (!found) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note not found", value: id }; } this.notes = next; observe({ type: "note_color_changed", actor: actor, id: id, color: color, ts: now() }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: id, color: color, text: actor.name + " recolored a pinboard note " + color + ".", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: delete_note
verbs.source: verb :delete_note(id) rx { let next = []; let found = false; let note_color = ""; for note in this.notes { if (note["id"] == id) { found = true; note_color = note["color"]; } else { next = next + [note]; } } if (!found) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note not found", value: id }; } this.notes = next; observe({ type: "note_deleted", actor: actor, id: id, ts: now() }); observe({ type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, note: id, color: note_color, text: actor.name + " deleted a " + note_color + " note from the pinboard.", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: clear_notes
verbs.source: verb :clear_notes() rx { if (!has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only wizards may clear the pinboard" }; } this.notes = []; this.next_note_id = 1; this.next_z = 1; observe({ type: "notes_cleared", actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

seed_hooks.name: Pinboard
seed_hooks.description: A shared cork-backed pinboard mounted on the Deck wall. It is a visible object in the chat world and a separate coordination space where people and agents arrange durable text notes.
